title: lamium album var. takeshimense
intro: Lamium album var. takeshimense, also known as white deadnettle, is a flowering plant in the mint family that has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of white deadnettle include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. White deadnettle can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams to support overall health and well-being.
